title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Chiffon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Pudding as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Long-pam LORD oven has been shot by Bege!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Will they manage to escape cacao Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And the land, too! Give it up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Very well. I shall carry out your execution myself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our ship can't leave the harbor anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you were carrying the cake to your ship,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even just barely managed to catch you, eh, chiffon?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is that bastard thinking?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: out of the way, whispers- nappers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Its paddles turned into tank treads!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never even heard of such a trick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Cause I never told ya about it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would I reveal my hand to a bunch of louts I planned on betraying anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pass the cake over to us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you crazy?! We could never safely transfer

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A cake of this size onto such a fast-moving ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What in the world is going on?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
